answer: Metadata extraction success rate was affected because the concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown. The metadata source was yaml_frontmatter, the incorrect source was body_text_only, the pipeline was md_frontmatter_ingest_v1, and the remediation was to enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files. Validation marker: concept-fm-canary-pass.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
